args.label: vantage-88375a50-b21a-4745-8fc6-a6ba11d97d9d
args.comment: Resolve dryrun field ids -> actual DOM ids (Ashby sometimes prefixes with form id).

args.label: vantage-88375a50-b21a-4745-8fc6-a6ba11d97d9d
args.comment:
chain_005 P1 (2026-05-26): native-setter FAST PATH. Tries
`_valueTracker.setValue` + input-event for each plain text
field. Chain_004 verified this DOES propagate React state
for Ashby String/Email/Phone/Number/Url/LongText on Sentry
& OpenAI tenants (5–10x faster than CDP keystrokes).
Driver MUST verify by re-reading each input.value after a
~50ms tick; any field whose read-back != requested value
falls through to the CDP-keystroke step below. Combobox /
Location fields are intentionally NOT in text_fields
(they go through ashby.location_typeahead_fill instead).
Kill switch: set ashby_filler.USE_NATIVE_SETTER_FAST_PATH=False.

args.label: vantage-88375a50-b21a-4745-8fc6-a6ba11d97d9d
args.comment:
FIX 1 (Harvey 671): for each (resolved_dom_id, value), driver must
  1. snapshot the input (ref by `#<dom_id>`), 2. act:click on the
  ref to focus, 3. clear via Ctrl+A then Delete keys, 4. act:type the
  value as REAL CDP keystrokes (NOT via JS native value setter).
chain_005 P1 (2026-05-26): driver should SKIP fields that the
fast-path step above already populated successfully. Only fields
whose read-back value != requested need CDP keystrokes.
date_fields (see below) ALSO go through this step — driver should
send an extra Enter key after typing each date_field value to
commit the react-datepicker selection.

args.label: vantage-88375a50-b21a-4745-8fc6-a6ba11d97d9d
args.comment:
FIX 2 (Harvey 671): resolve each radio group -> matching <label>
element id + bounding-rect center. Returns {picked: [{label_id, cx, cy, label_text, kind}]}.
chain_033 (2026-05-30 Notion fix): `kind` is either `radio_label`
(traditional <input type=radio>) or `yesno_button` (Notion / Speak /
Baseten / Plain style — <div class=_yesno_>Yes/No buttons + hidden
checkbox). Driver behavior is IDENTICAL for both kinds: scrollIntoView
on the element + `act:clickCoords` at (cx, cy). Do NOT use JS .click()
on the <input> — Ashby React validator ignores synthetic clicks.
Post-click verify (chain_033): re-evaluate JS_VERIFY —
`yesno_buttons_active` should equal `yesno_groups` (each Boolean field
now has an active button). If not, retry the missing entry's clickCoords.

args.label: vantage-88375a50-b21a-4745-8fc6-a6ba11d97d9d
args.comment:
FIX 3 (Harvey 671): driver must NOT use selector='#_systemfield_resume'
(silently no-ops on multi-file-input pages). Instead:
  1. browser.snapshot to get the page.
  2. Find the 'Upload File' button whose nearest ancestor label/
     section text contains 'Resume' (and NOT 'Transcript' or
     'Cover Letter' or other file-field labels).
  3. browser.upload ref=<that_button_ref> paths=[...].
  4. Verify by re-snapshot: page should show the resume filename.
FALLBACK (single file input on page): browser.upload
  element='#_systemfield_resume' paths=[...]. MUST use `element=`,
  NOT `selector=` — selector= silently no-ops with files=0.
  See _upload-regression-diag-20260525.md (2026-05-25).
POST-UPLOAD VERIFY (required): evaluate
  () => document.querySelector('#_systemfield_resume')?.files?.length || 0
  If 0, treat as UploadFailedError and retry once with element= form.

args.label: vantage-88375a50-b21a-4745-8fc6-a6ba11d97d9d
args.comment: Verify form state: counts of filled inputs, picked radios/checkboxes, attached files, submit button presence.

args.label: vantage-88375a50-b21a-4745-8fc6-a6ba11d97d9d
args.comment:
FIX 5 (strict-Ashby reCAPTCHA v3): driver should
  1. evaluate `() => Array.from(document.scripts).map(s=>s.src).filter(s=>s.includes('recaptcha'))`
     to confirm the v3 loader + extract sitekey from `?render=...`.
  2. If sitekey == known_strict_sitekey (Ashby shared infra), call
     captcha_solver.CaptchaSolver(vendor='capsolver').solve_recaptcha_v3(
       sitekey, page_url, page_action='submit', min_score=0.7)
  3. On token: evaluate to inject —
     `(t) => { const ids=['g-recaptcha-response','g-recaptcha-response-100000'];
      for (const id of ids) { let el=document.getElementById(id); if (!el){
        el=document.createElement('textarea'); el.id=id; el.name=id; el.style.display='none';
        document.body.appendChild(el);} el.value=t;} return {injected: ids.length};}`
  4. THEN click Submit. If SolverNotConfigured — skip (log
     `captcha-skipped-no-key`); submit will likely spam-flag but
     attempt is still required per per-role doctrine.
  5. If post-submit DOM still shows `[role=alert]` containing
     `flagged as possible spam`, the v3 score was sub-threshold;
     log per-tenant + bail (no infinite retry loop).
NEW 2026-05-27: easiest path is to just call
  `from captcha_presubmit import solve_and_inject_recaptcha_v3;
   solve_and_inject_recaptcha_v3(frame, **driver_exec.kwargs)`
  which handles detect+solve+inject in one call. No-op when
  ENABLE_CAPSOLVER!=1 — safe to leave wired permanently.

args.label: vantage-88375a50-b21a-4745-8fc6-a6ba11d97d9d
args.comment: FINAL: click 'Submit Application'. Run only after VERIFY passes manual review.
